rationale: Active war continues at maximum baseline; US-Iran deal negotiations remain a concern as they could further divert US attention and resources from Ukraine support.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war: active combat continues
top_events.summary: The war continues with no qualitative change this cycle — ongoing strikes, frontline pressure, and infrastructure risk remain the defining reality for Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal close to signing — US attention diverted
top_events.summary: Washington and Tehran reportedly near a first-stage deal, keeping US diplomatic focus on the Middle East rather than Ukraine. This risks slowing Western support momentum for Kyiv.

top_events.title: UK seizes suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker
top_events.summary: British enforcement against Russia's shadow oil fleet tightens sanctions pressure on Moscow, modestly supporting Ukraine's strategic position by constraining Russian revenues.
